conventions.world: Luau snippet that reads global `PARAMS` table and mutates Studio state. Run via execute_luau by prepending `local PARAMS = {...}`. Returns a result table the orchestrator can use to anchor downstream primitives.
conventions.script: Luau source with `{{SLOT}}` placeholders. Orchestrator substitutes slots, then creates a Script/LocalScript/ModuleScript and sets Source.
conventions.ui: LocalScript source with `{{SLOT}}` placeholders. Same substitution as script but parented under StarterPlayerScripts or a Tool.
conventions.asset: Resolver recipe: ordered list of Creator Store queries, optional procedural fallback snippet, and a vision verification prompt.

submerge_depth.note: how far the ball center sits below water; controls dome steepness

returns.waterline_radius: number — horizontal radius at y=0, used by dock/bridge anchoring
returns.peak_y: number — top y of the island
returns.model_path: string — Workspace path of the island marker model (if created)

anchor_pos.note: world position where the shore-end of the dock starts

direction.note: unit vector pointing away from shore into water (Y must be 0)

returns.tip_position: Vector3 — world pos at the far end of the dock (good NPC/spawn anchor)

script.weighted_random.exports: function pick() -> selectedEntry — picks proportional to entry.weight

script.click_to_use.behavior: Tool.Activated handler. Reads mouse.Hit and fires named RemoteEvent on a server folder. Optional client-side target validation.

script.inventory_award.exports: function award(player, opts) — creates a Tool from opts and parents to Backpack. opts: { name, handle_shape, handle_color, handle_size, halo_color?, halo_range? }

ui.toast.exports: function show(text, color, duration) on a singleton ScreenGui label parented to the local player's PlayerGui
